concerns.text: FR-009 requires a sensitivity analysis sweeping R² thresholds {0.3, 0.5, 0.6, 0.7}. The plan.md 'Technical Context' and 'Complexity Tracking' sections do not mention this analysis, nor does the 'Project Structure' include a specific module or task for it. The 'Evaluation' section in plan.md lists 'CV, bootstrapping, SHAP, t-tests' but omits the sensitivity sweep required by FR-009 and SC-005.

SC-005 defines the measurement for the sensitivity analysis (R² threshold sweep). The plan.md does not describe how this metric will be calculated or reported, leaving the success criterion for this specific requirement unbacked by a concrete implementation step.
